title: agrostis alba subsp. filifolia
intro: Agrostis alba subsp. filifolia, also known as the white bent grass, is a type of grass native to certain regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis alba subsp. filifolia include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Agrostis alba subsp. filifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
